input.initialPrompt: Modernize this project to SDK-style format. Identify all legacy patterns and suggest how to simplify the project file.

data.reasoningText: The user wants me to modernize the .csproj file from the old-style format to the new SDK-style format. Let me first look at the current project file and the source files to understand what's there.

data.content:
Here's my analysis of the legacy patterns and how to modernize:

## Legacy Patterns Identified

| # | Legacy Pattern | SDK-Style Replacement |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `ToolsVersion` + XML namespace | `<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">` |
| 2 | Manual `Import` of Common.props/targets | Implicit via SDK |
| 3 | `Configuration`/`Platform` conditionals | SDK defaults handle Debug/Release |
| 4 | `ProjectGuid` | No longer needed |
| 5 | `FileAlignment`, `AutoGenerateBindingRedirects` | SDK defaults |
| 6 | Debug/Release PropertyGroups (OutputPath, DebugType, etc.) | SDK conventions |
| 7 | Explicit `<Compile Include="...">` items | Glob-based auto-include |
| 8 | `<Reference Include="System.*">` | Implicit with .NET framework ref |
| 9 | `Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs` | Auto-generated; use `<PropertyGroup>` metadata |
| 10 | `TargetFrameworkVersion v4.7.2` | `<TargetFramework>net472</TargetFramework>` (or upgrade to `net8.0`) |

## Modernized SDK-Style Project

```xml
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
    <RootNamespace>LegacyApp</RootNamespace>
    <AssemblyName>LegacyApp</AssemblyName>
    <Description>A legacy-style project for modernization testing</Description>
    <Company>TestCo</Company>
    <Copyright>Copyright © 2024</Copyright>
    <Version>1.0.0.0</Version>
  </PropertyGroup>
</Project>
```

**Key simplifications:**
- **47 lines → 11 lines** — SDK handles everything else by convention
- `Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs` can be deleted (metadata moves to `<PropertyGroup>`)
- All `.cs` files are compiled automatically (no explicit `<Compile>` items)
- Framework references are implicit
- Debug/Release configurations use SDK defaults

Would you like me to apply this modernization?
